codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original legacy completions surface commit and the fix commit. The new terminal guard closes the prior blocking gap: `CompletionAccumulator::finish()` now rejects `[DONE]`-only transcripts unless at least one completion payload was successfully parsed, while the existing streamed/non-streamed `text_completion` assembly path and `best_of` streaming restriction remain intact.

summary: Pass: the fix commit `3c10ca5` adequately resolves the prior blocking scrutiny finding. `src/resources/completions.rs` now tracks whether any completion payload was parsed before finalization, and `tests/completions_stream_contract.rs` adds a focused `[DONE]`-only regression test while preserving the existing shared `text_completion` shape and `best_of` streaming coverage.
